item.title: Aave’s crown crashes as $8B TVL evaporates after Kelp DAO hack. Bad debt hits $195M; $5.1B in stablecoins frozen. Can liquidity return or is this the new normal? 🚨 https://Blockchain.News/news/aave-crashes-kelp-dao-hack-8b-tvl-exodus #DeFi #Aave #KelpDAO

item.title: Bitcoin’s halving cycle underwhelms: 97% gains vs 761%+ past, volatility at 1.75% signals a structural shift. Is this the new normal or a temporary lu... https://Blockchain.News/news/btc-cycle-97-percent-gains-halving-volatility-historic-lows #Bitcoin #Halving #Volatility
